mapper.select: SELECT oa.* FROM overtime_application oa INNER JOIN emp_employee e ON oa.emp_id = e.id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND oa.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY oa.create_time DESC

SELECT oa.id, oa.overtime_no as overtimeNo, e.name as empName, e.dept_id as deptId, d.dept_name as deptName, oa.overtime_type as overtimeType, CASE oa.overtime_type WHEN 1 THEN '工作日加班' WHEN 2 THEN '周末加班' WHEN 3 THEN '节假日加班' ELSE '其他' END as overtimeTypeName, oa.start_time as startTime, oa.end_time as endTime, oa.hours, oa.reason, oa.status, CASE oa.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' ELSE '未知' END as statusText, oa.create_time as createTime FROM overtime_application oa LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON oa.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY oa.create_time DESC
